nodes.name: Fetch Brand Site
nodes.notes: Fetches the PowerPlug homepage to extract current branding, logo URL, navigation structure, and contact page URL. Used to ensure article branding stays aligned with the live site.

nodes.name: Extract Brand Intelligence
nodes.notes: Parses the brand site HTML to extract logo URL, contact URL, and validates brand assets. Outputs a structured brand object used by the AI generation node.

nodes.name: Prepare Prompt Context
nodes.notes: Merges the webhook input (topic, keyword, word count, image URLs) with extracted brand intelligence to create the full context object for AI generation.

nodes.name: Generate Article (AI)
nodes.notes: Generates the full HTML article using the system prompt and brand context. Temperature 0.4 for consistency. Uses GPT-4o for high-quality output.

nodes.name: Validate & Sanitize Output
nodes.notes: Post-generation validation: checks for wrong logos (sentice), verifies brand colors, validates section structure, checks for JS accordions vs details/summary, and auto-fixes common issues.

nodes.name: Load System Prompt
nodes.notes: Constructs the system prompt dynamically using extracted brand data. In production, the full prompt from Improved_N8N_Prompt.txt should be loaded from storage.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns the generated HTML article and validation report to the webhook caller.
